completions.label: nest-controller

documentation.value: Creates a NestJS controller with route prefix and sample GET endpoint.

completions.label: nest-module

documentation.value: Creates a NestJS module with imports, controllers, providers, and exports arrays.

completions.label: nest-service

documentation.value: Creates a NestJS injectable service class with constructor.

completions.label: nest-guard

documentation.value: Creates a NestJS guard implementing CanActivate interface.

completions.label: nest-pipe

documentation.value: Creates a NestJS custom pipe implementing PipeTransform.

completions.label: nest-interceptor

documentation.value: Creates a NestJS interceptor implementing NestInterceptor.

completions.label: nest-filter

documentation.value: Creates a NestJS exception filter implementing ExceptionFilter.

completions.label: nest-middleware

documentation.value: Creates a NestJS middleware implementing NestMiddleware.

completions.label: nest-gateway

documentation.value: Creates a NestJS WebSocket gateway with event handling.

completions.label: nest-microservice

documentation.value: Creates a NestJS microservice controller with message patterns.

completions.label: nest-crud

documentation.value: Creates a full CRUD controller with all HTTP methods.

completions.label: nest-entity

documentation.value: Creates a TypeORM entity class with common decorators.

completions.label: nest-dto

documentation.value: Creates a DTO class with class-validator decorators.

completions.label: nest-e2e-test

documentation.value: Creates a NestJS end-to-end test with supertest.

completions.label: nest-unit-test

documentation.value: Creates a NestJS unit test for a service with TestingModule.
Marks a class as a NestJS controller. Accepts an optional route path prefix.
Routes HTTP GET requests to the decorated method. Accepts an optional path.
Routes HTTP POST requests to the decorated method. Accepts an optional path.
Routes HTTP PUT requests to the decorated method. Accepts an optional path.
Routes HTTP PATCH requests to the decorated method. Accepts an optional path.
Routes HTTP DELETE requests to the decorated method. Accepts an optional path.
Marks a class as a NestJS module. Accepts metadata: imports, controllers, providers, exports.
Marks a class as a provider that can be managed by the NestJS IoC container.
Injects a provider by token. Used for non-class-based (custom) provider injection.
Marks a constructor parameter as optional. Prevents errors when the provider is not available.
Extracts the request body. Accepts an optional property key.
Extracts a route parameter. Accepts an optional parameter name.
Extracts query string parameters. Accepts an optional query key.
Extracts headers from the request. Accepts an optional header name.
Injects the underlying platform request object (e.g., Express Request).
Injects the underlying platform response object. Note: using @Res() disables NestJS standard response handling.
Sets the HTTP response status code for the decorated route handler.
Sets a custom response header for the decorated route handler.
Redirects the response to the given URL with an optional status code.
Renders a view template using the configured template engine (e.g., Handlebars, Pug).
Binds guards to the scope of the controller or method. Guards determine whether a request should be handled.
Binds interceptors to the scope of the controller or method. Interceptors add extra logic before/after method execution.
Binds pipes to the scope of the controller or method. Pipes transform or validate input data.
Binds exception filters to the scope of the controller or method.
Attaches custom metadata to a route handler, accessible via Reflector.
Marks a class as an exception filter for the given exception type(s).
Subscribes to an event-based microservice pattern (fire-and-forget).
Subscribes to a request-response microservice message pattern.
Marks a class as a WebSocket gateway. Accepts optional port and namespace options.
Subscribes to a specific WebSocket message event.
Injects the connected client socket instance into a gateway method.
Injects the underlying WebSocket server instance.
Marks a method as a Server-Sent Events endpoint.
Schedules a method to run on a cron expression using @nestjs/schedule.
Schedules a method to run at a fixed interval in milliseconds.
Schedules a method to run once after a timeout in milliseconds.
Adds tags to the Swagger documentation for grouping endpoints.
Describes an API operation for Swagger documentation.
Documents an API response status code and description for Swagger.
Decorates a DTO property for Swagger schema documentation.
Describes the request body schema for Swagger documentation.
Marks an endpoint as requiring Bearer token authentication in Swagger.
Extracts the payload from a microservice message.
Injects the microservice context object into a handler.
Extracts the client IP address from the request.
Extracts the session object from the request.
Extracts a single uploaded file from the request (used with FileInterceptor).
Extracts multiple uploaded files from the request (used with FilesInterceptor).
Makes a module global-scoped. Global modules are available everywhere without importing.
Factory class to create a NestJS application instance. Provides create() and createMicroservice() methods.

completions.label: NestFactory.create

documentation.value: Creates an instance of NestApplication from a root module.

completions.insertText:
const app = await NestFactory.create(${1:AppModule});
await app.listen(${2:3000});

documentation.value: Interface for the NestJS application instance. Provides methods like listen(), use(), useGlobalPipes(), etc.
Provides access to the internal provider container for dynamic provider resolution.
Helper class to retrieve metadata set via @SetMetadata(). Used in guards and interceptors.
Base class for HTTP exceptions. Accepts a response body and status code.
Enum of standard HTTP status codes (OK, CREATED, BAD_REQUEST, UNAUTHORIZED, etc.).
Throws a 400 Bad Request HTTP exception.
Throws a 401 Unauthorized HTTP exception.
Throws a 403 Forbidden HTTP exception.
Throws a 404 Not Found HTTP exception.
Throws a 409 Conflict HTTP exception.
Throws a 500 Internal Server Error HTTP exception.
Throws a 501 Not Implemented HTTP exception.
Throws a 410 Gone HTTP exception.
Throws a 413 Payload Too Large HTTP exception.
Throws a 422 Unprocessable Entity HTTP exception.
Throws a 503 Service Unavailable HTTP exception.
Creates a testing module for unit and integration tests with NestJS.
Compiled testing module that provides get() and resolve() methods for retrieving providers.
Extends ArgumentsHost with helper methods to determine the current handler and class being invoked.
Provides methods to retrieve arguments for HTTP, WebSocket, or RPC contexts.
Built-in logger service with log levels: log, error, warn, debug, verbose.
Module for loading environment variables and configuration. Provides ConfigService for accessing values.
Service to access configuration values loaded by ConfigModule. Use get() to retrieve values.

completions.label: TypeOrmModule

documentation.value: Module for integrating TypeORM with NestJS. Provides forRoot() and forFeature() methods.

completions.insertText:
TypeOrmModule.forRoot({
  type: '${1:postgres}',
  host: '${2:localhost}',
  port: ${3:5432},
  username: '${4:user}',
  password: '${5:password}',
  database: '${6:db}',
  entities: [${7}],
  synchronize: ${8:false},
})

documentation.value: Registers TypeORM repositories for the given entities in the current module scope.
Module for integrating Mongoose ODM with NestJS. Provides forRoot() and forFeature() methods.
Registers Mongoose schemas for the given models in the current module scope.
Module for JWT token generation and verification using @nestjs/jwt.
Module for integrating Passport.js authentication strategies with NestJS.
Rate limiting module to protect endpoints from brute-force attacks.
Module for caching responses. Supports in-memory and external stores like Redis.
Module for task scheduling using cron jobs, intervals, and timeouts.
Module for queue management using Bull and Redis for background job processing.
Module for event-driven architecture using Node.js EventEmitter.
Module for serving static files (SPA, assets) from a directory.
Module for integrating GraphQL with NestJS. Supports code-first and schema-first approaches.
Guard that triggers Passport authentication for a given strategy (e.g., 'jwt', 'local').

completions.label: ValidationPipe

documentation.value: Pipe that validates incoming data using class-validator decorators. Supports whitelist, transform, and forbidNonWhitelisted.
Pipe that transforms a string parameter into an integer. Throws BadRequestException on failure.
Pipe that transforms a string parameter into a boolean.
Pipe that parses and validates arrays. Supports item type validation.
Pipe that validates and parses UUID parameters.
Pipe that validates a parameter is a valid enum value.
Pipe that provides a default value when the parameter is null or undefined.
Pipe that transforms a string parameter into a floating-point number.
Interceptor that serializes response objects using class-transformer. Respects @Exclude() and @Expose() decorators.
Interceptor that automatically caches responses. Works with CacheModule.
Interceptor for handling single file uploads via multipart/form-data using Multer.
Interceptor for handling multiple file uploads via multipart/form-data using Multer.
Scaffolds a new NestJS project with the CLI. Usage: nest new project-name
Generates a new NestJS controller with the CLI.
Generates a new NestJS service with the CLI.
Generates a new NestJS module with the CLI.
Generates a complete CRUD resource (module, controller, service, DTOs, entities).
Compiles the NestJS application.
Compiles and runs the NestJS application.

completions.label: app.useGlobalPipes

documentation.value: Applies a pipe globally to every route handler in the application.
Applies an exception filter globally to every route handler.
Applies a guard globally to every route handler.
Applies an interceptor globally to every route handler.
Enables Cross-Origin Resource Sharing on the NestJS application.
Sets a prefix for every HTTP route registered in the application (e.g., 'api').
Enables URI, header, or media-type based API versioning.

completions.label: SwaggerModule.setup

documentation.value: Sets up Swagger UI documentation endpoint for the NestJS application.
Lifecycle hook called once the host module's dependencies have been resolved.
Lifecycle hook called when the host module is being destroyed.
Lifecycle hook called once all modules have been initialized.
Lifecycle hook called after app.close() is invoked. Receives the signal string.
Lifecycle hook called before the application shutdown sequence. Connections are still open.
Injects a TypeORM repository for the given entity into a constructor parameter.
Injects a Mongoose model for the given schema into a constructor parameter.
Service for signing and verifying JWT tokens. Provided by JwtModule.
Service for making HTTP requests using Axios. Provided by HttpModule.
Module that exposes HttpService for making external HTTP requests via Axios.
Module for implementing health check endpoints using @nestjs/terminus.
Configuration options for NestJS microservices (transport, options, etc.).
Enum of microservice transport layers: TCP, REDIS, NATS, MQTT, gRPC, KAFKA, RMQ.
Proxy class for sending messages to other microservices.

completions.label: ClientsModule

documentation.value: Module for registering microservice client connections.
Enum for API versioning strategies: URI, HEADER, MEDIA_TYPE, CUSTOM.
Sets the API version for a controller or route handler.
Builder class for creating Swagger/OpenAPI document configuration.
Guard that limits request rates. Used with ThrottlerModule.

completions.label: RolesGuard

documentation.value: Common pattern for role-based access control guard using Reflector.
Pipe that applies a transformation function to the input value.

completions.label: ParseFilePipe

documentation.value: Pipe for validating file uploads with validators like MaxFileSizeValidator and FileTypeValidator.

completions.label: TimeoutInterceptor

documentation.value: Common pattern for a timeout interceptor that throws RequestTimeoutException.

completions.label: LoggingInterceptor

documentation.value: Common pattern for a logging interceptor that logs method execution time.

completions.label: AllExceptionsFilter

documentation.value: Exception filter that catches all exceptions, not just HttpException.

completions.label: @UseInterceptors(FileInterceptor)

documentation.value: Applies FileInterceptor for handling single file upload endpoints.
Interface returned by static methods like forRoot() and forRootAsync() for dynamic module registration.
Union type representing all valid NestJS provider types: class, value, factory, existing.
Provider that uses a factory function to create the provider instance.
Provider that maps a token to a class implementation.
Provider that maps a token to a static value.
